calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: CAROL KAREN, CSR#8189. (514)

Robert P. Garcia, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BRAHMA SWAMI.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ASHUTOSH KUMAR MISHRA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Brahma Swami sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $26,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $13,934.00
Attorney's Fees: $770.00
Costs: $630.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,834.00
Judgment signed in open court.
